summary: Iteration 14 — Comprehensive end-to-end health check after multiple feature additions (pagination, avatar upload, call-flow statuses, direct-pay signup, industry-aware sidebar, PWA badge, password eye toggle, caller self-assign, RBAC tightening). Backend pytest: 30/32 PASSED, 1 SKIPPED (industry widget field check is verified inline via lead-create response), 1 FAILED (empty-name validation missing on POST /api/leads). Frontend smoke: login eye-toggle works, direct-pay register banner + CTA render correctly with '₹3,538.82' and 'Create account & pay', sidebar shows 'Counselling' for Education industry, Add Lead dialog opens with all 15 statuses, Subscription page loads Plans/Invoices, Profile page exposes 3 password fields. Logout button is inside a dropdown menu (couldn't auto-click without nav, not a defect).

critical.issue: Empty name ("name": "") is accepted and a lead is created with name='' — review request explicitly states 'Backend rejects empty name (Pydantic)'. Pydantic model is not enforcing min_length>=1 / strip+validate on name. Frontend toast guards it but backend MUST too (curl bypass possible).

Response includes raw MongoDB ObjectId field '_id' AND no canonical 'id' field. /api/auth/login does normalize to 'id', but listing endpoints expose '_id'. Violates code-review rule 'MongoDB ObjectId — Always exclude mongodb objectId _id'. Frontends compensate by reading _id || lead_id.

minor.issue: Public industry config endpoint does not include the inline widget field definitions (company_name/designation). Frontend probably relies on the post-login /api/auth/me payload or hard-coded mapping. If admins want to fetch widget schema before signup, this endpoint should expose `widget_fields` (company_name, designation for it_software).

issues: Stale-auth-context issue from iteration 13 still applies — after PUT /api/users/me or avatar upload, topbar avatar/name do not refresh until full re-login. (Not retested this iteration but unfixed per main agent action items.)

action_items: Enforce non-empty `name` on POST /api/leads via Pydantic (e.g., constr(strip_whitespace=True, min_length=1) or @validator stripping then asserting len>0). Same for PUT /api/leads/{id}.
Strip MongoDB `_id` from all list/detail responses (or rename to `id` consistently). At minimum exclude `_id` from /api/leads, /api/leads/{id}, /api/users, /api/followups items.
Refresh useAuth user context after PUT /api/users/me + avatar upload/delete (carryover from iter 13).
Optional: surface industry widget fields in /api/industries/{key}.features so frontend never hard-codes company_name/designation.
critical_code_review_comments: /app/backend/server.py is still 5000+ lines — split into modules (auth, leads, users, billing, uploads, locations, industry).
Lead-assignment RBAC is implemented correctly on both POST and PUT — verified 400 with 'Leads can only be assigned to counselors or telecallers'.
Counselor self-add: backend correctly self-assigns + suppresses 'assigned to you' notification — verified.
Industry feature flags (demos / demo_label / admissions) returned correctly for all 8 industries via /api/industries/{key} — verified.
Razorpay LIVE key returned by /api/razorpay/config (rzp_live_*) — verified.
City/state endpoints accessible to counselor role (36 states, 186 WB cities) — verified.
Login + register + profile have correct data-testid='*-password-input-toggle' on all eye-toggle buttons — verified.

success_rate.frontend: ~90% (all critical flows render; direct-pay banner + CTA confirmed, eye toggles work, sidebar industry-aware)

test_credentials: From /app/memory/test_credentials.md — Super Admin admin@educationcrm.com / Admin@123; Org Admin orgadmin@demo.com / Demo@123; Manager manager@demo.com / Demo@123; Counselor counselor@demo.com / Demo@123; Telecaller telecaller@demo.com / Demo@123.
seed_data_creation: Created handful of TEST_HC_* leads via pytest (random mobile numbers per run to avoid 409 duplicate-mobile collisions). All cleaned up via DELETE /api/leads/{_id}. No persistent test data left.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Auth, RBAC, pagination, industry config, locations, badge, subscription, Razorpay LIVE key — all green. Real bug: backend accepts empty `name` on lead create — needs Pydantic constraint. Secondary: `_id` leak in /api/leads and /api/users responses. Frontend stale-auth from iter 13 still open. UI smoke is happy-path only; no deep flow tests (drill-down columns for IT Software, Excel export columns, InvoiceDialog content) ran in browser this iteration — backend endpoints exist but per-industry org switching wasn't done. Direct-pay register page banner + CTA + plan toggle verified visually.
rca of the issue: Empty-name accepted: the LeadCreate Pydantic model likely uses `name: str` without `Field(..., min_length=1)` or a strip_whitespace validator. Mitigation: change to `name: constr(strip_whitespace=True, min_length=1)` (or pydantic v2 `Annotated[str, StringConstraints(min_length=1, strip_whitespace=True)]`). _id leak: GET endpoints serialize the raw mongo document; add `{'_id': 0}` projection or pop('_id', None) before returning. Frontend hot-fix: continue to read `_id || lead_id` until backend cleanup.
